MyDocuments.title: My Documents
MyDocuments.shortHelp: Lists the documents that you own.
MyDocuments.longHelp: Displays documents based on when they were created or last modified, using predefined time ranges such as Past 24 hours, Past week, Past month, Past year, or Any time. This list includes Controlled Documents but excludes Controlled Document Templates.
Favorites.title: Favorites
Favorites.shortHelp: Lists the documents that you have marked as favorites.
Favorites.longHelp: To mark a document as a favorite, use the Add to Favorites in the Toolbar while it is open or selected.
AllDocuments.title: All Documents
AllDocuments.shortHelp: Lists all documents that you have access to, including documents owned by other users.
AllDocuments.longHelp: You can filter the documents based on their creation or modifications date.
Upload.title: Upload
Upload.shortHelp: Upload a file from your device to create a document.
Upload.longHelp: You can drop a file from your local system into any list view and the app creates a document with that file.
NewDocument.title: New Document
NewDocument.shortHelp: Create a document without uploading files, to act as a container for related files you can add later.
NewDocument.longHelp: You can add files from the Files tab during creation or after the document is created.
Preview.title: Preview
Preview.shortHelp: Previews a document using the 3DPlay Web App to show the contents of the document.
Preview.longHelp: You can quickly review the contents of the document and perform actions such as update, search, annotate, and publish to 3DSwym.
Edit.title: Edit
Edit.shortHelp: Locks the file and downloads it to your local system.
Edit.longHelp: Other users cannot modify the file.
LockAndDownload.title: Lock and Download
LockAndDownload.shortHelp: Locks the file and downloads it to your local system.
LockAndDownload.longHelp: Other users cannot modify the file.
UndoEdit.title: Cancel Edit
UndoEdit.shortHelp: Unlocks the file without making any changes.
UndoEdit.longHelp: Other users can now modify the file.
DocumentUnlock.title: Document Unlock
DocumentUnlock.shortHelp: Unlock the document to allow changes by other users.
DocumentUnlock.longHelp: Once unlocked, other users can change the document’s properties and the files it contains.
DocumentLock.title: Document Lock
DocumentLock.longHelp: When locked, other users cannot change the document’s properties or any of the files it contains.
Download.title: Download
Download.shortHelp: Downloads the file to your local system with the name defined as per the admin settings.
Download.longHelp: If the document contains more than one file, the app downloads all the files in a zip file.
Share.title: Share
Share.shortHelp: Shares the selected documents with individual users, user groups, or collaborative space/organizations.
Share.longHelp: You can also apply various permissions to allow (or prevent) other users to view, use, or modify a document.
CopyLink.title: Copy Link
CopyLink.shortHelp: Copies the URL of the document to the clipboard, so that you can share it with others.
CopyLink.longHelp: When someone with permissions to the document clicks the link, Document Management opens showing a preview version of the document.
Copy.title: Copy
Copy.shortHelp: Copy selected document to the app clipboard.
Copy.longHelp: You can then Paste the copied item from the clipboard to add it as attachment.
Paste.title: Paste
Paste.shortHelp: Pastes the attachment copied to app clipboard.
Paste.longHelp: You can then Paste the copied item from the clipboard to add it as attachment.
Relations.title: Relations
Relations.shortHelp: Open the Relations app and displays objects related to the selected document.
Relations.longHelp: The table view shows related objects according to the different relation types. You can expand or collapse each relation in table view.
Maturity.title: Maturity
Maturity.shortHelp: Modifies the maturity state of the selected objects.
Maturity.longHelp: In the dialog box, select the target state from the maturity graph if you selected one object, or from list if you have selected several objects.
NewRevision.title: New Revision
NewRevision.shortHelp: Creates a revision of the selected document containing the latest version of the files included in the document.
NewRevision.longHelp: A revision captures a content evolution of the object, that you can modify afterward.
Update.title: Update
Update.shortHelp: Opens a file upload window that lets you replace the file with a new version.
Update.longHelp: Locate the file that you want to upload and click Open. Enter Comments and click Upload to upload the new version. The file begins uploading and an "Update Successful" message appears.
UpdateAndUnlock.title: Update and Unlock
UpdateAndUnlock.shortHelp: Unlocks the file and prompts you to upload an updated version.
UpdateAndUnlock.longHelp: Other users can now modify the file.
UploadFile.title: Upload File
UploadFile.shortHelp: Upload a new file to the document.
UploadFile.longHelp: Select the file, enter Comments, and click Upload.
DeleteFile.title: Delete File
DeleteFile.longHelp: Along with file, all it's iterations will also be deleted.
Delete.title: Delete
Delete.shortHelp: Deletes the document permanently and the file(s) it contains.
Delete.longHelp: Click Confirm at the confirmation prompt.
Revisions.title: Revisions
Revisions.shortHelp: Opens a panel that displays all revisions of a document. You can also display its duplicates.
Revisions.longHelp: The links between objects and the lifecycle icons show the lifecycle operation that created them. Use the toolbar to navigate and resize the display. You can also display the graph list view to see the objects in a spreadsheet.
Duplicate.title: Duplicate
Duplicate.shortHelp: Creates another document using the content of the selected document.
Duplicate.longHelp: You can specify collaborative space credentials and add a prefix to the title of the document. If you duplicate multiple documents, the prefix is added to all duplicates.
Compare.title: Compare
Compare.shortHelp: Opens the Compare widget to show the differences between the selected document, or between the selected document and another structure or filter.
Compare.longHelp: If you selected only one document, load another document in the right section of Compare's home page. You can compare up to five documents.
Move.title: Move
Move.shortHelp: Moves the selected document(s) to another collaborative space and/or organization, and can change its owner.
Move.longHelp: Search the targeted collaborative space and organization, and select them. To change the owner, click Change Owner, search the targeted user, and select it. To add information about the operation, click Add Message. This operation cannot be reversed, except by the new owner.
ChangeOwner.title: Change Owner
ChangeOwner.shortHelp: Launches a panel that allows you to change the owner of the document.
ChangeOwner.longHelp: In the dialog box, search for a user, select it, and then click Change Owner. You can add information about the operation in the Add Message box.
AddToLibraries.title: Add to Libraries
AddToLibraries.shortHelp: Adds the document to an existing library for classification.
AddToLibraries.longHelp: A library is the top level of your hierarchy, and the container objects within libraries are called classes.
Subscribe.title: Subscribe
Subscribe.shortHelp: Specify the document events that you want to be notified about.
Subscribe.longHelp: You receive notifications only for operations perfomed by other users. You do not receive a notification if you perform the operation.
UnSubscribe.title: Unsubscribe
UnSubscribe.shortHelp: Specify the document events that you do not want to be notified about.
EditSubscriptions.title: Edit Subscriptions
EditSubscriptions.shortHelp: Make changes to the documents and events you are subscribed to.
EditSubscriptions.longHelp: The dialog box lets you select or clear the check box for the events that apply to the object.
MySubscriptions.title: My Subscriptions
MySubscriptions.shortHelp: Allows you to manage subscriptions to documents and events.
MySubscriptions.longHelp: The dialog box lets you filter the list based on the object type and event, and search for text (either object or event names). You can click for any event to unsubscribe yourself, or select any number of events and click on the toolbar to unsubscribe from all of the selected events.
EditSubscriptionForOthers.title: Edit Subscription For Others
EditSubscriptionForOthers.shortHelp: Make changes to the documents and events that other 3DEXPERIENCE platform users and user groups are subscribed to.
EditSubscriptionForOthers.longHelp: This dialog box lets you expand and view subscriptions by object, event type, and person. You can unsubscribe a person from an event, all persons from an event, and all event subscriptions for all persons for an object.
OfficeWebEdition.title: Office Web Edition
OfficeWebEdition.shortHelp: Allows you to edit the file
OfficeWebEdition.longHelp: This command appears if you enable the Office Document Editor option in the Platform Management cockpit. It opens Microsoft Office documents in the integrated web-based version of Microsoft Office.  If Collaboration for Microsoft is installed and configured on the platform, Edit automatically opens the file in its native Microsoft application on your local system.
NewBranch.title: New Branch
NewBranch.shortHelp: You can create a revision of the selected document in a new branch.
NewBranch.longHelp: The New Branch dialog box appears. If you selected several documents it displays the list of selected documents and all the required content automatically added to the scope, with their type, revision ID, and maturity state.
LockDocumentAndDownload.title: Lock Document and Download Files
LockDocumentAndDownload.shortHelp: Lock the document and download the files to your device.
LockDocumentAndDownload.longHelp: Locks the document so only you can make changes, and saves all files to your device for offline access or sharing. If multiple files are contained in the document, they are downloaded as a ZIP file.
UnlockDocumentAndUpdate.title: Unlock Document and Update Files
UnlockDocumentAndUpdate.shortHelp: Unlock the document and prompts you to upload a new version of the file.
UnlockDocumentAndUpdate.longHelp: Allows others to make changes to the document and replaces the selected file with a new version.
AddToFavorites.title: Add to Favorites
AddToFavorites.shortHelp: Adds the document to your favorites list.
AddToFavorites.longHelp: Any document you favorite appears in the Favorites section of the Access your Work panel.
RemoveFromFavorites.title: Remove from Favorites
RemoveFromFavorites.shortHelp: Removes the document from your favorites list.
RemoveFromFavorites.longHelp: Any document you unfavorite is removed from the Favorites section of the Access your Work panel.
TableView.title: Table View
TableView.shortHelp: Displays information in a table that contains one row for each item.
TableView.longHelp: This view is useful when you want to see the most detailed information about documents, and to sort or group them based on this information.
ThumbnailView.title: Thumbnail View
ThumbnailView.shortHelp: Displays each item as a medium-sized thumbnail of the document.
ThumbnailView.longHelp: This view is useful when you want to see information about each document in a thumbnail format.
TileView.title: Tile View
TileView.shortHelp: Displays each item as a small tile.
TileView.longHelp: This view is useful when you want to see minimal information about each documentin a compact format.
UploadAttachment.title: Upload
UploadAttachment.shortHelp: Uploads a file from your computer to attach to the context object.
UploadAttachment.longHelp: You can also drop a file from 3DSearch results or your computer to the content area to upload the file.
Attach.title: Attach
Attach.shortHelp: Uses 3DSearch to find and select an existing document to attach to the context object.
Attach.longHelp: You can also add image files.
CreateLink.title: Create Link
CreateLink.shortHelp: Opens a New Link panel that allows you to enter a Title and destination URL.
CreateLink.longHelp: Select Repeat to keep the panel open after you click Create so that you can continue to create links.
ReplaceByRevision.title: Replace by Revision
ReplaceByRevision.longHelp: Select the revision to replace the current attachment. Not available for drawings.
ReplaceByLatestRevision.title: Replace by Latest Revision
ReplaceByLatestRevision.shortHelp: Replaces the current revision with the latest revision of that attachment.
Search.title: Search
Search.shortHelp: Enter the name of the file that you want to find in the input field that appears to the left of the command.
Search.longHelp: This command only searches for files in the Files tab.
Rename.title: Rename
Rename.shortHelp: Allows you to rename the file in the Rename panel.
Rename.longHelp: You cannot change the file extension.
FileIterations.title: File Iterations
FileIterations.shortHelp: Allows you to manage the iterations of files in a document.
FileIterations.longHelp: The Iterations panel appears and lets you Restore and Download any iteration of a file in a document.
SubscribeForOthers.title: Subscribe for Others
SubscribeForOthers.shortHelp: Subscribe other 3DEXPERIENCE platform users and user groups to documents and events.
SubscribeForOthers.longHelp: The dialog box lets you add users and user groups and select or clear the check box for the events that apply to the object.
Lock.title: Lock
Lock.shortHelp: Locks the file and prevents other users from editing or deleting the file.
Lock.longHelp: Other users cannot modify the file.
Unlock.title: Unlock
Unlock.shortHelp: Unlocks the file without making any changes.
Unlock.longHelp: Other users can modify unlocked files. Only appears if you or someone else has locked the document.
Remove.title: Remove
Remove.shortHelp: Removes the selected attachment from the document.
OpenLink.title: Open Link
OpenLink.shortHelp: Open Exlernal link in the browser.
OpenLink.longHelp: Open External link in the browser from currently linked attachment
DeleteLink.title: Delete Link
DeleteLink.shortHelp: Deleted the selected content from the attachment.
DeleteLink.longHelp: From the attachments facet, select one or more objects and click this command to remove the selected content.
Information.title: Information
Information.shortHelp: Displays information about the selected object in different tabs in a side pane.
Information.longHelp: The available tabs depend on the app they are launched from, and the type of object that is selected.
